task_completion.description: Launch Screaming Frog and enter the target URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider application is open with 'https://crawler-test.com/' entered in the top URL bar.

task_completion.description: Configure custom extraction for OG Title and OG Image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog 'Custom Extraction' configuration window is visible, showing active rules (e.g., XPath, regex, or CSS Path) specifically named or targeting 'OG Title' and 'OG Image'.

task_completion.description: Run the crawl on the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Screaming Frog window shows a populated list of URLs from 'crawler-test.com' and the crawl progress indicator shows completion or active crawling.

task_completion.description: Export the crawl data as a CSV file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal, or save dialog showing 'social_tags_export.csv' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the missing social tags text report in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file explorer showing 'missing_social_tags.txt' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Ensure the text report contains the required statistics and at least three specific URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'missing_social_tags.txt' are visible and include: the total number of URLs crawled, the number of URLs missing Open Graph tags, and a list of at least three specific URLs.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog graphical interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands (like curl or wget) or Python scripts bypassing the tool.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated by Screaming Frog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'Export' button/menu in Screaming Frog, rather than manually creating a CSV file in a text editor and typing fake data.

integrity.description: The text report contains actual crawl data, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers and URLs in 'missing_social_tags.txt' look like genuine crawl results from crawler-test.com, not placeholder text like '[Insert Total URLs Here]' or hallucinated URLs like 'https://crawler-test.com/facebook/no_og_tags'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is 'https://crawler-test.com/'. Expected export file is 'social_tags_export.csv' in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. Expected report file is 'missing_social_tags.txt' in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'. Note: The agent must find actual URLs missing OG tags from the live site crawl; hallucinated URLs like 'https://crawler-test.com/facebook/no_og_tags' are invalid and return 404s on the live site.
